cars.name: Toyota Corolla 202
cars.description: An economical and practical sedan from Toyota, known for its fuel efficiency and driving comfort. Equipped with a 1.6L engine and advanced safety technologies.

cars.name: Toyota Camry 2024
cars.description: The luxurious Toyota Camry sedan combines elegance with high performance. Powered by a 2.5L engine producing 203 horsepower.

cars.name: Toyota Land Cruiser 2024
cars.description: The legendary king of off-road, Toyota Land Cruiser with a 3.5L twin-turbo V6 engine. Advanced four-wheel drive system.

cars.name: BMW 320i 2024
cars.description: BMW 3 Series, the luxury sports sedan. 2.0L turbo engine producing 184 horsepower with sport seats.

cars.name: BMW X5 2024
cars.description: The luxury SUV from BMW. 3.0L inline-six turbo engine producing 335 horsepower with xDrive intelligent all-wheel drive.

cars.name: BMW 520i 2024
cars.description: The executive sedan from BMW. 2.0L turbo engine producing 208 horsepower with iDrive 8 system.

cars.name: Chery Tiggo 4 Pro 2024
cars.description: An economical crossover from Chery, ideal for city driving. 1.5L turbo engine with CVT transmission.

cars.name: Chery Tiggo 8 Pro 2024
cars.description: A spacious family SUV from Chery with 7 seats. 1.6L turbo engine producing 197 horsepower.

cars.name: Mercedes C200 2024
cars.description: The luxury sedan from Mercedes-Benz. 1.5L mild-hybrid turbo engine with EQ Boost system producing 204 horsepower.

cars.name: Mercedes E200 2024
cars.description: The executive sedan from Mercedes. 2.0L turbo engine producing 197 horsepower with 9G-Tronic transmission.

cars.name: Mercedes S500 2024
cars.description: The pinnacle of luxury from Mercedes-Benz. 3.0L inline-six turbo with mild-hybrid system producing 429 horsepower.

cars.name: BYD Han 2024
cars.description: A luxury electric sedan from BYD. Blade Battery with a range of up to 550 km and a unique rotating screen.

cars.name: BYD Seal 2024
cars.description: The electric sports car from BYD. Blade Battery with a range of up to 700 km. 0-100 km/h in 5.9 seconds.
